## Summary

Describe the mechanics, schema, docs, or tooling changes in this pull request.

## Checklist

- [ ] Mechanic IDs are unique and follow the naming convention.
- [ ] New or edited mechanic files pass `schema/mechanic.schema.json`.
- [ ] Related mechanic references exist or use `future.` / `external.` prefixes.
- [ ] Writing is original and does not copy protected text.
- [ ] Example game references are short factual notes.
- [ ] `python tools/validate_dataset.py` passes.
- [ ] `python tools/generate_index.py` was run after data changes.
